jsonLd.title: Pantaloons is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pantaloons! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pantaloons:
Pantaloons is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons!
